assertions.title: No network requests during processing or interaction
assertions.reason: CSP connect-src is correctly set to 'none', but 6 same-origin script/worker network requests were recorded after baseline during upload→review→download.

steps.action: Open preview app on :5174, wait for initial load, and record baseline network requests
steps.expected: Baseline is clear before running flow
steps.observed: Baseline request log was empty (0 requests).

steps.action: Upload detect-008-no-pii.pdf, proceed to review, then click Download redacted PDF to Done screen
steps.expected: Complete full cycle with no additional network traffic
steps.observed: Flow completed to Done screen and a download artifact was produced.

steps.action: Capture post-cycle network requests and inspect CSP meta connect-src
steps.expected: No requests after baseline and connect-src 'none'
steps.observed: connect-src was 'none', but post-cycle log contained 6 new GET requests (detect-document chunk, redact-document chunk, pdf.worker script).

assertions.issues: Contract requires zero network requests after initial load; observed 6 same-origin script/worker requests during the cycle.

assertions.title: Full cleanup on Start over — no residual data
assertions.reason: Start over returned to drop screen, emitted explicit cleanup confirmation log, and a second upload processed cleanly with no residual highlights/data from the first file.

steps.action: Upload first file (detect-001-all-entities.pdf) and reach review screen
steps.observed: Preview loaded successfully with review controls and highlights.

steps.expected: Return to clean drop screen and perform cleanup
steps.observed: App returned to drop screen immediately.

steps.action: Inspect console logs after Start over
steps.observed: Console included: 'LocalRedact: cleanup complete — PDF destroyed, canvases released, URLs revoked, state reset'.

steps.expected: Second file processes without stale state
steps.observed: Second preview opened cleanly; structured check showed decisionNodes=0, svgRects=0, and no known prior value in body text.

frictions.description: Hidden input[type=file] was not interactable by default in headless automation.
frictions.resolution: Temporarily exposed the existing input via session-local DOM style updates, then used agent-browser upload.
